steps.t: The missing stone is out there somewhere, waiting to be found.
The missing stone is out there somewhere, waiting to be found.
You have found a hidden chamber in the Paths of the Dead. You should investigate the chamber.
A rune-stone trap stands in your way of the fourth stone. You should find someone who may be able to help.
Márus has told you that you must find the original chisel to have any hopes of dismantling the rune-stone trap. You should find the original chisel.
Márus has asked you for several ingredients to make a protective rune-stone. His list included these items: powerful fire-enchanted chisel, copper and…
With the protection rune-stone and the original chisel, you can now dismantle the trap. You should return the chamber in the Paths of the Dead and rem…
With the rune-stone removed, you can now safely open the door. You should open the door in the chamber.
The fourth stone is yours for the taking! You should take the fourth stone.
The fourth stone is yours! You should return it to its rightful place in the Crown Chamber.
